sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Keima Topa Zeisu lamdang Honpa hi.
Kei ading lamdang Honpa hi,
Suangpi kitam sungah ka kha hongliah sak
Nuamna gunpi bang hong musak.
Chorus
Suangpi kitam sung keima kha hongliahsak.
Tua suang pi'n gamgawtak liap sak,
Ait na sungah ka nuntak na phum ta,
(Ama khutin kei honghum ta)2
Verse2
Keima Topa Zeisu lamdang honpa hi.
A mah'n puakhia keima vanpi,
A mah'n honglen a kei kaling keiding hi.
Ka ni bangin tha hongpia hi.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Kisim zolo thupha hongpia kimat in,
A ma hoihna tawh kidim in,
Lungdam in la kasa Pasian minthang hen,
Hih bang Tanpa kanei hi ke'n.

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Ama dikna puanpaak silha kathawh ciang,
Amah dawnin ka lentoh ciang,
Ama hongitna leh honghotna kicing,
Vanah awn tampi tawh saning.
